It's designed to withstand high-impact forces, making it suitable for loosening rusted or frozen screws and nuts without damaging them. CHROME-PLATED AND HEAT TREATED: The bits in this set are chrome-plated and heat-treated for added strength and longevity. They are resistant to corrosion and wear, ensuring that they will last through many tough tasks. 1/2" DRIVE IMPACT DRIVER: The 1/2" drive impact driver is a powerful tool that allows you to apply significant force to stubborn fasteners.
